message:
chore(deps): pin version numbers on path dependencies and bump asupersync lockfile

Add explicit version constraints alongside path dependencies so that
Cargo resolves versions deterministically even when path overrides
are absent (e.g., in CI or on fresh clones):

- toon (tru): pin "0.2.0"
- ftui, ftui-extras, ftui-harness: pin "0.2.0"
- frankensearch-embed, frankensearch-index: pin "0.1.0"

Cargo.lock: update asupersync version from 0.2.0 to 0.2.2 to match
the upstream asupersync workspace bump.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
